# Simple Ordered List

1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

# Simple Unordered List

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three

# Nested Unordered List

- Item 1
  - Sub 1.1
  - Sub 1.2
- Item 2
  - Sub 2.1
    - Sub-sub 2.1.1
    - Sub-sub 2.1.2
  - Sub 2.2
- Item 3

# Nested Ordered List

1. Item 1
   1. Sub 1.1
   2. Sub 1.2
2. Item 2
   1. Sub 2.1
   2. Sub 2.2
